module.name: common
module.purpose: Owns shared configuration, third-party wrappers, telemetry logging/query support, and transport/queue structures reused across Marix packages.

childModules.name: config
childModules.purpose: Strongly typed TOML configuration models and loading, including separate telemetry transport and self-hosted HTTP page ports.

childModules.name: external
childModules.purpose: Re-exports approved third-party namespaces and traits for common, including UUID generation and redb read/query support.

childModules.name: logging
childModules.purpose: Owns process telemetry logging with optional session correlation, config-selected local or authenticated remote sinks, host-only redb queries, and session/log filtering APIs.

childModules.name: structure
childModules.purpose: Owns shared channel and work-queue structures, including authenticated remoc transport, wildcard IPv4 server listeners, configured client endpoints, handshake timeouts, and reusable queue cleanup.
